/usr/bin/ar qc liboptiflow_optimization.a CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/ActionGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/GridTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/StorageTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/Scenario.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/BellmanSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/CsvScenarioReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/ForwardSimulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/Interpolator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/Policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/PumpedStorageModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/StateGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/optiflow_optimization.dir/src/ValueFunction.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liboptiflow_optimization.a
